잠언 4:1.content: Listen, sons, to a father’s instruction. Pay attention and know understanding;

잠언 4:2.content: for I give you sound learning. Don’t forsake my law.

잠언 4:3.content: For I was a son to my father, tender and an only child in the sight of my mother.

잠언 4:4.content: He taught me, and said to me: “Let your heart retain my words. Keep my commandments, and live.

잠언 4:5.content: Get wisdom. Get understanding. Don’t forget, and don’t deviate from the words of my mouth.

잠언 4:6.content: Don’t forsake her, and she will preserve you. Love her, and she will keep you.

잠언 4:7.content: Wisdom is supreme. Get wisdom. Yes, though it costs all your possessions, get understanding.

잠언 4:8.content: Esteem her, and she will exalt you. She will bring you to honor when you embrace her.

잠언 4:9.content: She will give to your head a garland of grace. She will deliver a crown of splendor to you.”

잠언 4:10.content: Listen, my son, and receive my sayings. The years of your life will be many.

잠언 4:11.content: I have taught you in the way of wisdom. I have led you in straight paths.

잠언 4:12.content: When you go, your steps will not be hampered. When you run, you will not stumble.

잠언 4:13.content: Take firm hold of instruction. Don’t let her go. Keep her, for she is your life.

잠언 4:14.content: Don’t enter into the path of the wicked. Don’t walk in the way of evil men.

잠언 4:15.content: Avoid it, and don’t pass by it. Turn from it, and pass on.

잠언 4:16.content: For they don’t sleep unless they do evil. Their sleep is taken away, unless they make someone fall.

잠언 4:17.content: For they eat the bread of wickedness and drink the wine of violence.

잠언 4:18.content: But the path of the righteous is like the dawning light that shines more and more until the perfect day.

잠언 4:19.content: The way of the wicked is like darkness. They don’t know what they stumble over.

잠언 4:20.content: My son, attend to my words. Turn your ear to my sayings.

잠언 4:21.content: Let them not depart from your eyes. Keep them in the center of your heart.

잠언 4:22.content: For they are life to those who find them, and health to their whole body.

잠언 4:23.content: Keep your heart with all diligence, for out of it is the wellspring of life.

잠언 4:24.content: Put away from yourself a perverse mouth. Put corrupt lips far from you.

잠언 4:25.content: Let your eyes look straight ahead. Fix your gaze directly before you.

잠언 4:26.content: Make the path of your feet level. Let all of your ways be established.

잠언 4:27.content: Don’t turn to the right hand nor to the left. Remove your foot from evil.
